overall.description: A cinematic static view of a medieval fantasy common room or great hall with Gothic architecture, featuring stone walls, wooden beam ceilings, and tall arched windows. Characters in dark robes move about the furnished interior with leather sofas, tables, and a lit fireplace, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics reminiscent of a wizarding school setting.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with seating areas and fireplace

events.description: character in dark robes enters from foreground and walks toward the back of the hall
second character enters from right side and walks across the room
additional characters become visible moving through the space increasing crowd density slightly

agents.ego_description: stationary elevated camera observing the great hall and character movements from above

notable_agents.action: character in dark wizard robes walking from foreground toward the fireplace area
character entering from right side and walking toward the seating area

entered.detail: large stone fireplace with burning fire and ornate mantle
tall arched windows with stone tracery allowing bright daylight to enter
high vaulted ceiling with exposed dark wooden beams and trusses
red and gold wall hangings with heraldic designs
iron chandelier with multiple candles hanging from ceiling
dark leather upholstered sofas and armchairs arranged in seating groups
circular wooden table with books and objects on surface
patterned red and gold rug covering the stone floor
suit of medieval armor standing in the corner near the fireplace

segments.scene_description: A static elevated view of a medieval Gothic great hall with warm mixed lighting from windows and fireplace. Characters in dark robes walk through the space, entering from various points and moving between the leather seating areas. The room features stone walls with red tapestries, a high wooden beam ceiling, and ornate furniture arranged on patterned rugs.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, elevated perspective of a medieval Gothic great hall where the atmosphere is defined by the interplay of warm light and quiet movement. It begins with a wide view of the expansive space, capturing the glow from tall arched windows and a flickering fireplace against the stone walls. As characters in dark robes drift through the hall, the focus shifts across the interior, tracing their paths as they move between leather seating areas and ornate furniture. The scene then settles on the rich textures of the room, highlighting the red tapestries and patterned rugs beneath the high wooden beam ceiling.
